untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Z-score calculation on a correlated pair (AREX and WLL components), which is not available in the allowed indicator list. Z-score is a statistical measure requiring mean and standard deviation computation across a pair relationship. The allowed indicators do not include pair correlation metrics, z-score values, or statistical spread calculations. Approximated entry/exit using price vs SMA as a mean-reversion proxy, but this does not capture the true paired z-score logic specified in the original signal.
translation_notes: Original signal requires z-score thresholds (-2.0 for long, +2.0 for short) with reversion target at 0.0 on paired instruments. Since z-score calculation is not supported, used SMA_20 as a simplified mean-reversion substitute. True implementation requires custom z-score computation on the AREX/WLL pair correlation. Signal is marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original specification but cannot be fully translated without z-score support.
